---
applyTo: "**/CMakeLists.txt,**/*.cmake,**/*.h,**/*.hpp,**/*.hxx,**/*.cpp,**/*.cxx,**/*.cc"
---

# CMake & include structure

Follow the repo's canonical CMake and `#include` conventions. The full rules and
review checklist are in [`cmake/cmake-structure.md`](../../cmake/cmake-structure.md)
— read and apply that file before changing build files, header placement, or
include paths.
